description: The sleek silhouetting on this shoe from quechua from women will make this low-top pair an off-duty essential. These kicks are great for a casual jog on a foggy weekday or while training on the tracks. Wear these with track suits or with your favourite jeans and a sweatshirt!UpperTextile upper with synthetic leather overlays Reinforced overlay on the toe box and heel collarCentral lace upsPadded tongue Padded insole for instep comfortMesh liningOut-sole reinforced onto the upper at the heel and toe box for abrasion free comfortMid-soleRubber mid-soleOut-soleCurved mid-foot with waffle patterned lugs on the TPR out soleShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store under direct sunlight
